title: E-Commerce 3D Product Box Main Image
sourceTitle: E Commerce Main Image 3D Product Box Dieline Visualization

imagePrompts.prompt: Assemble the dieline into a flawless 3D box with accurate panels, clean folds, undistorted type, and artwork preserved exactly. shoot it upright at a refined ¾ angle in a {argument name="setting" default="minimal premium studio setting"} with a soft neutral background, diffused light, subtle shadows, no props, true colours, {argument name="texture" default="matte paperboard texture"}, and realistic editorial detail
